hero.title: BENELUX Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan
hero.subtitle: Connecting companies and entrepreneurs from Belgium, the Netherlands and Luxembourg with the business community of Uzbekistan.

home-about.title: About the BENELUX Chamber of Commerce
home-about.text1: The BENELUX Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan connects companies and entrepreneurs from Belgium, the Netherlands, and Luxembourg with the business community of Uzbekistan.
home-about.text2: We create a platform for cooperation, investment, knowledge exchange, and the development of strong and sustainable business relations between our countries.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.description: We collaborate with leading institutions, embassies and organizations to strengthen Benelux–Uzbekistan business relations.

join_form.title: Interested in joining the chamber?
join_form.text: Leave your contact details and our team will get in touch to discuss membership opportunities and cooperation.
join_form.name: Your name
